response.original_title: 妄想アイテム究極進化シリーズ せっかく女になったのに…不完全な女体化で下半身はふたなり！？4 ふたなり痴漢編 本当は女の子になりすましてレズ痴漢したかったけどチ○ポとマ○コのWの快感に今はドッピュン大満足！
response.overview: A habitual train molester transforms into a hermaphrodite beauty with a gender transformation drug! Unlimited molestation in a women-only train car! Students confused by same-sex molesters are shocked by giant penises bursting from their skirts! She also infiltrates as a female teaching assistant! A female detective transformed into a hermaphrodite faces hermaphrodite-on-hermaphrodite lesbian punishment! Penises and vaginas climax simultaneously!
response.tagline: A gender transformation drug turns a habitual molester into a futanari beauty — but not completely.
response.title: 妄想アイテム究極進化シリーズ せっかく女になったのに…不完全な女体化で下半身はふたなり！？4 ふたなり痴漢編 本当は女の子になりすましてレズ痴漢したかったけどチ○ポとマ○コのWの快感に今はドッピュン大満足！
